Hero.title1: Digital Transformation on the Shop Floor:
Hero.subtitle: We deliver true Industry 4.0. We natively integrate advanced management software with intelligent hardware to build a hyper-connected, autonomous, and predictive factory.

MES.sectionSubtitle: The brain of your industrial operation. Total visibility from production order to shipping.
MES.card1Text: Industrial panels on every line. Real-time OEE tracking, downtime, and highly traceable production order execution.
MES.card2Text: Standardized digital forms, consolidated operational audit history, and paperless capture of critical variables.
MES.card3Text: Interactive screens (Wall of Fame) signaling line status, losses, and real-time productivity to the entire factory.
MES.card4Text: Modern 'Bottom-Up' operator management, leadership balancing, and automated tracking of factory training.
MES.card5Text: Visual management for continuous improvement, Kaizen idea submission, and digital A3 panels for structured problem solving on the factory floor.
MES.card6Text: Digital inspection routines for leadership on the shop floor, with photo attachments and tracking of improvement opportunities.
MES.card7Text: Automated safety cross, incident reporting, and investigative analysis of operational safety to guarantee a zero-accident environment.
MES.card8Text: Dynamic terminals for bottom-up leadership evaluation surveys, workforce mood index, and tracking of multifaceted training (ILUO).
MES.card9Text: Structured control over tool check-in/check-out, links to production BOMs, and asset returns within the consumables ecosystem.

IoT.sectionSubtitle: Cutting-edge industrial equipment to digitize the physical world and integrate it into the MES.
IoT.card1Text: Vibration and temperature sensors continuously monitoring active equipment health.
IoT.card2Text: Facial/RFID attendance control integrated directly with shift costs in the central MES.
IoT.card3Text: Level sensors, material flow, and seamless integration with high-precision shop floor scales.
IoT.card4Text: Direct PLC actuation via dedicated IoT Gateway to close the automation loop.

Benefits.title: Why choose our system?
Benefits.b1Text: Anticipate downtimes and increase the uptime of your machine fleet.
Benefits.b2Text: Inspect parts with technology that removes human error from the equation.
Benefits.b3Text: The whole factory speaking the same language, reporting bottlenecks in seconds.

Hardware.title: IoT Industrial Hardware: The Engineering of the Future
Hardware.subtitle: We design and manufacture our own aerospace-grade edge devices, natively prepared for extreme factory environments. Each unit is a marvel of microelectronics, operating via standalone logic boards housed in fully water and dust sealed casings. Equipped with long-lasting embedded batteries and robust Wi-Fi/Bluetooth modules, we guarantee an instant, secure, and limitless integration cycle directly into our M.E.S. ecosystem.
Hardware.hcard1Text: Dedicated terminals with external flow meters to dynamically read the flow of raw materials (liquids, gases, paints, resins, composites). Consumptions are reported in real time to the M.E.S., allocating costs with surgical precision to the Production Order.
Hardware.hcard2Text: Advanced control peripheral via high-frequency NFC and RFID. Provides secure authenticity to log dynamic operations, track forklift movements or trace numerical cycles across the digital shop floor.
Hardware.hcard3Text: Weight and calibration processing terminal. Compatible with industrial scales, this gateway captures solid weight variations with maximum traceability, feeding the M.E.S. with data immune to human measurement errors.
Hardware.hcard4Text: The beating heart of a connected factory. Featuring a color TFT screen, it’s designed to couple with legacy machines, mills, or robots, reading direct PLC pulses. It allows the M.E.S. to calculate OEE with astronomical reliability.
Hardware.hcard5Text: The invisible guardian of your factory. Class I sensor node that broadcasts critical environmental data (Humidity and Core Temperature) non-stop, protecting the curing phase of sensitive products and maintaining clean-room compliance.
Hardware.hcard6Text: Infallible level and distance measurement system in vats and silos via ultrasonic frequencies. It triggers automated refill protocols in the central MES platform, warning of immediate input shortages for production.
Hardware.hcard7Text: Central alert and reporting board for MES notifications equipped with an independent GSM card slot (2G/4G/SMS). Guarantees that, in the event of a total Wi-Fi outage, factory management still receives urgent maintenance requests.
Hardware.hcard8Text: Unit equipped with optical integration (camera) and pulse reading to count raw materials on continuous belts. Streamlines synergies with the MES to capture pass-through inputs without manual intervention.
Hardware.hcard9Text: State-of-the-art hybrid terminal designed for biometric logging via Front Vision (Facial Recognition) alongside a magnetic RFID badge reader. Direct cloud-syncing for accurate HR cost calculation.

Footer.slogan: We transform conventional factories into intelligent centers of excellence through proprietary software and hardware.
